name: RunOnce Registry Key Configuration Change
description: Detects changes to the RunOnce registry key, indicating a program or script is configured to run automatically after a user logs on. Adversaries frequently modify this key to establish persistence or defense evasion. Immediate investigation is required to confirm the legitimacy of any detected changes.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the registry event.

parameters.name: EventID
parameters.description: The Sysmon Event ID for Registry Value Set (12).

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the process image that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: ProcessId
parameters.description: The Process ID of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: CommandLine
parameters.description: The command line of the process that modified the registry key.

parameters.name: TargetObject
parameters.description: The full path to the modified registry key within the RunOnce or RunOnceEx hive.

parameters.name: Details
parameters.description: The details of the registry value that was set, including its type and data.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the registry modification occurred.

parameters.name: Computer
parameters.description: The hostname where the event occurred.
